page.title: Categories
page.subtitle: Organize the money you spend and the money you earn.

spending.title: Spending tiers
spending.subtitle: Organize your spending into tiers you control.

tier.categoryLimitTooltip: Each tier can have at most {{max}} categories.
tier.empty: No categories in this tier yet — add your first one.

category.addDescription: Create a new category and assign it to a tier.
category.editDescription: Update the details of this category.

tier.addDescription: Create a new tier to group your categories.
tier.editDescription: Rename, recolor, or change whether this tier counts as essential.

delete.categoryDescription: will be removed. Expenses tagged with it stay, but become uncategorized.
delete.tierDescription: will be removed. Categories in this tier stay, but become untiered until you reassign them.

form.name: Name
form.essentialDescription: Spending in essential tiers counts toward your monthly baseline.

toast.signInRequiredCategory: You need to be signed in to manage categories.
toast.signInRequiredTier: You need to be signed in to manage tiers.
